blocks.content: Creating a lesson in em3k is straightforward. Each lesson page is a JSON file that defines the heading, optional subhead, and an array of content blocks.
Let's look at the structure of a basic lesson page. Every page follows this format:
heading: The main title displayed at the top of the page
subhead: An optional subtitle (can be empty string)
blocks: An array of content blocks that make up the page
Each block has an id (unique number), a type (text, slideshow, image, or video), and type-specific content.
